ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_id_hash" TEXT /* Hashed identifier for the officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department to which the officer belongs */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department to which the officer belongs */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  "email" TEXT /* Officer's email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Officer's phone number */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the officer's supervisor */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Officer's training level */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department's supervisor */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "subject_race" TEXT /* Race of the subject */,
  "subject_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject */,
  "raw_ethnicity" TEXT /* Raw ethnicity data from the source */,
  "raw_race" TEXT /* Raw race data from the source */,
  "address" TEXT /* Subject's address */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Subject's driver's license number */,
  "vehicle_registration" TEXT /* Subject's vehicle registration number */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_for_stop" TEXT /* Reason for initiating the traffic stop */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the traffic stop */,
  "arrest_made" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an arrest was made */,
  "citation_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a citation was issued */,
  "warning_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a warning was issued */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
